ogTitle: Goonoo Goonoo vs Goorangoola: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goonoo Goonoo and Goorangoola.
heading: Goonoo Goonoo vs Goorangoola — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goonoo Goonoo, New South Wales and Goorangoola, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goorangoola has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Goonoo Goonoo (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goonoo Goonoo or Goorangoola safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goonoo Goonoo has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Goorangoola scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goonoo Goonoo scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Goorangoola scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goonoo Goonoo or Goorangoola?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goorangoola has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.42% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
